_meta.description: Coverage regions. Each region maps to one or more PLANNING AREA polygons in data/singapore-planning-simplified.geojson (matched by 'areas' array; values are uppercase GeoJSON property names).
_meta.tier: core' = orange highlight + heavier stroke; 'cover' = standard active
_meta.edit: Update marketAngle, schools, projects, connectivity to keep buyer info fresh. Median prices auto-pulled from data/valuation.json.

uraRegions._note: Master URA region groupings used for base color. Hex values are pastel-on-cream variants of the brand palette.

regions.name: Sengkang & Punggol
regions.marketAngle: Highest BTO concentration in Singapore. 3,200+ flats hitting MOP in 2026, the biggest resale supply wave nationwide.
regions.projects: Punggol Waterway · Punggol Digital District · Sengkang Riverside · Coney Island
regions.schools: Mee Toh · Compassvale · Punggol Cove · Greendale

regions.name: Bishan, AMK & Toa Payoh
regions.marketAngle: Mature heartland with Singapore's strongest resale demand. Premium valuations driven by central location + top schools.
regions.connectivity: NSL · CCL · TEL (Mount Pleasant interchange upcoming)
regions.projects: Bishan Loft · Toa Payoh Crest · AMK Court · Bidadari estate
regions.schools: Catholic High · Raffles Institution · ACS (Junior) · CHIJ St Nicholas

regions.name: Tampines & Bedok
regions.marketAngle: East side family hub. Tampines new town vitality + Bedok mature flat sizes. 2,133 flats hitting MOP in Tampines this year.
regions.projects: Tampines GreenVerge · Bedok Reservoir · Tampines Hub · Changi City Point
regions.schools: St Hilda's · Red Swastika · Temasek · Anglican High

regions.name: Sembawang & Yishun
regions.marketAngle: Affordable entry to the resale market. Strong upgrading potential as TEL fully opens.
regions.projects: EastDelta @ Canberra · Yishun Heights · Khatib Bongsu

regions.name: Woodlands
regions.marketAngle: Northern gateway. RTS Link & Woodlands Regional Centre driving long-term growth.
regions.connectivity: NSL · TEL · RTS Link to JB (2027)
regions.projects: Champions Bliss · Marsiling estates · Woodlands North Coast
regions.schools: Riverside Primary · Singapore Sports School · Innova JC

regions.name: Pasir Ris
regions.marketAngle: Coastal living. Spacious flats, well-priced versus Tampines. Upcoming Cross Island Line interchange.
regions.projects: Pasir Ris Heights · Pasir Ris Mall · Downtown East
regions.schools: Elias Park · White Sands Primary · Meridian

regions.name: Hougang
regions.marketAngle: Quietly underrated. Strong amenity base + steady resale market with a loyal community.
regions.projects: Hougang RiverCourt · Hougang Mall · The Florence Residences nearby

regions.name: Serangoon
regions.marketAngle: Between Central and North-East. NEX mall, top schools and dual-line MRT make it one of SG's most liveable HDB towns.
regions.projects: Lorong Lew Lian · NEX corridor · Botanique at Bartley

regions.name: Choa Chu Kang
regions.marketAngle: Generous flat sizes at competitive prices. Tengah eco-town developing nearby drives upside.
regions.projects: Keat Hong Mirage · Yew Tee Square · Tengah Plantation District
regions.schools: Concord Primary · Unity · CHIJ Our Lady Queen of Peace

regions.name: Bukit Panjang
regions.marketAngle: Quiet, green, well-connected. Steady price appreciation driven by DTL access + Hillview growth.
regions.projects: Senja Heights · Hillion Mall · The Petals

regions.name: Bukit Batok
regions.marketAngle: Serene greenery. Tengah developing nearby, with long-term upside from the new estate's amenities.
regions.projects: West Plains · Bukit Gombak Park · The Reflections at Keppel Bay nearby

regions.name: Jurong East & West
regions.marketAngle: JLD (Jurong Lake District) transformation. Best long-term bet for upgraders & investors.
regions.projects: Jurong Lake Vista · JEM · Westgate · IMM · Jurong Innovation District
regions.schools: Crest Secondary · Jurong Secondary · Rulang Primary

regions.name: Clementi
regions.marketAngle: Premium west. Top schools + NUS proximity drive steady premiums.
regions.projects: Casa Clementi · Clementi Mall · The Trilinq
regions.schools: Nan Hua · NUS High · ACS Independent (nearby)

regions.name: Queenstown
regions.marketAngle: Singapore's first satellite town. Now one of its most coveted addresses. Dawson set the $1.7M HDB record in Q1 2026.
regions.projects: Dawson SkyTerrace · Stirling Residences · Queensway Shopping Centre

regions.name: Bukit Merah
regions.marketAngle: Most central HDB town. Strong CBD-proximity premium + Greater Southern Waterfront exposure.
regions.projects: Telok Blangah Beacon · VivoCity · HarbourFront · Greater Southern Waterfront
regions.schools: CHIJ St Theresa's · Gan Eng Seng · Henderson Secondary

regions.name: Kallang/Whampoa
regions.marketAngle: Riverside lifestyle + Marina Bay proximity. Sports Hub + Kallang Alive transformation underway.
regions.projects: Kallang Trivelis · Kallang Wave · Sports Hub · Kallang Alive Master Plan

regions.name: Geylang
regions.marketAngle: Often overlooked. Best-priced flats near city centre, with strong rental yields.
regions.projects: MacPherson Spring · Geylang Serai · Paya Lebar Quarter

regions.name: Marine Parade
regions.marketAngle: Seafront living. Katong heritage + East Coast Park + TEL stations now live (Marine Parade · Marine Terrace · Siglap).
regions.projects: Pine Close · Katong Mall · East Coast Park · Marine Parade Central
regions.schools: CHIJ Katong · Tao Nan · Tanjong Katong · Haig Girls'
